problem id: 8076c574
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  10011000 -> 00100110
  00110111 -> 11001101
  11010000 -> 00110100
  01011010 -> 10010110
  00111100 -> 00001111
  11110110 -> 10111101
  10011110 -> 10100111
  10110000 -> 00101100

query: 11111010
predicted answer: 10111110
